reviews.title: Terrible experience for my first time to stay in Tam Ky
reviews.text: Obviously, the hotel has not been maintained for long time. The room smells musty. The toilet has no ventilation fan, light bulb has not been replaced. This experience is not what I expected when using Agoda service.

reviews.title: The hotel is OK, and the reception staff in particular are friendly. But I will not be back
reviews.positives:
The receptionist who welcomed me was exceptionally friendly and pleasant, spoke good English, and I was also allowed to check in about an hour earlier than the official 2 pm time. Definite plus points for that.
The room on the 5th floor was spacious and well laid out, and the shower enclosure in particular was impressive. I also appreciated having a balcony. The bed was “Asian firm”, but I actually slept reasonably comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
The advertised restaurant – which reception even confirmed existed – was never open at any point. The furniture was arranged as if for a reception, there was no menu in sight, no visible staff, and the lights were off. The same applied to the lobby bar, which was also unmanned. So even if it might technically have been possible to insist on being served in the restaurant or bar, it is simply uninviting when the lights are off and there is no staff present.
The walls in the corridors are paper-thin. Every sound could be heard: every noise, every cough, every word, and every toilet sound (quite literally) from the neighbouring room, as if you were in there yourself. The same applied to noises from the corridor. Bring earplugs if you want to sleep past 6:30 in the morning.
Breakfast was nothing special. There were not enough tables unless you were prepared to sit with complete strangers.
The location is quiet, but rather isolated from the town centre, which is a couple of kilometres away.

reviews.response:
Kính thưa Quý khách hàng, sau khi nhận được phản ánh từ Khách hàng, chúng tôi đã kiểm tra lại thông tin đặt phòng của Quý khách với Lễ tân. Quý khách đặt hạng phòng Deluxe Double- Phòng rộng 25m2, giường 1m6, chỉ dành cho 2 người lớn. Nhưng khi check-in, Quý khách lại đi cùng 2 con của mình: 1 bé 8 tuổi và 1 bé 10 tuổi. Chính sách phụ thu Khách sạn đã để rất rõ trước khi Quý khách hoàn tất đặt phòng. Bé dưới 6t thì mới được free, còn bé 7-12 tuổi, khách sạn phụ thu 120.000đ/bé. (ở cùng giường với bố mẹ) 
Phí upgrade lên hạng phòng Deluxe Twin là 150.000đ
Hồ bơi thì trong mô tả khách sạn vẫn để là hồ bơi ngoài trời. 
Tất cả thông tin, Khách sạn đã để rất chi tiết trong Booking để Quý khách nắm rõ trước khi quyết định đặt phòng. 
Một lần nữa, chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn. Sales- Ngân.
